debug_info.goal:
X : Type u_1
inst✝³ : MeasurableSpace X
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace X
inst✝¹ : LocallyCompactSpace X
inst✝ : T2Space X
μ : ComplexMeasure X
h : ∀ (f : ZeroAtInftyContinuousMap X ℂ), μ.integral ⇑f = 0
⊢ μ = 0

failed_attempts:
have : μ s = 0 := by
    apply Complex.ext <;> simpa using (by
      · exact congrArg id hμ
      · exact congrArg id hμ')
  simpa using this

exact hne (by
      simpa using (ComplexMeasure.eq_zero_of_integral_eq_zero (μ := μ) (X := X) h))
  simpa [ComplexMeasure.ext_iff] using h'

have h1 : μ.im = 0 := by
    ext f
    have := congrArg Complex.im (h f)
    simpa [ComplexMeasure.integral, ComplexMeasure.integral_def] using this
  simpa [ComplexMeasure.ext_iff, h0, h1] using (ComplexMeasure.ext_iff.mp rfl s hs)

intro f
    have := congrArg Complex.im (h f)
    simpa [ComplexMeasure.integral, ComplexMeasure.integral_def] using this
  have : μ.re = 0 := by
    ext1 t ht
    simpa using congrArg (fun ν => ν t) h'
  have : μ.im = 0 := by
    ext1 t ht
    simpa using congrArg (fun ν => ν t) h''
  simpa [ComplexMeasure.ext_ae_iff] using μ.ext (by
    intro t ht
    simp [this] )

ext f
        simpa using h f)
    simpa [ComplexMeasure.toMeasure_apply] using congrArg Complex.re (by simpa using this)
  have : μ = 0 := by
    ext t ht
    simpa [h'] using congrArg (fun ν : ComplexMeasure X => ν t) (by rfl : μ = μ)
  simpa using this
